name: Supply Crate (Large)
prompt:
Large US military wooden supply crate for airdrop/logistics. Bigger than ammo crate, for equipment and supplies.

Physical structure:
- Main box: large wooden crate, ~1.2m x 0.8m x 0.8m
  - Plank construction (visible horizontal planks)
  - Corner reinforcements (darker wood strips at each vertical edge)
- Lid: flat top with cross-brace pattern
  - Two wooden strips forming X on top
- Stencil markings: "US ARMY" or "SUPPLY" represented as colored strips on one side
  - White/yellow marking areas
- Metal banding: two dark metal straps around crate
  - Horizontal bands at 1/3 and 2/3 height
- Rope handles: on each short end (simplified as short boxes)

Colors: Natural wood (0x8B7B55), darker reinforcements (0x6B5B3A), metal bands (0x555555), white markings (0xe0e0d0)
Orientation: Sitting on ground at Y=0, longest side along X
Scale: Real-world meters (~1.2m x 0.8m x 0.8m)
